disabled_facilities_grant_dfg.name: Disabled Facilities Grant (DFG)
disabled_facilities_grant_dfg.description: Grant to help with the cost of adapting your home to meet the needs of a disabled person.
disabled_facilities_grant_dfg.means_tested: Yes for adults, but usually NOT means-tested for children under 19 in England (check local council rules).

family_fund.name: Family Fund
family_fund.description: Charity providing grants for disabled or seriously ill children and young people.
family_fund.eligibility: Low income families (usually under £35,000 household income). Child must have high support needs.

motability_scheme.name: Motability Scheme
motability_scheme.description: Lease a car, powered wheelchair, or scooter in exchange for your mobility allowance.

blue_badge.name: Blue Badge Scheme
blue_badge.eligibility: Automatic if receiving DLA Higher Mobility or PIP Mobility (8+ points for 'moving around' or 10+ points for 'planning and following a journey').

council_tax_disability_reduction.name: Council Tax Disability Reduction Scheme
council_tax_disability_reduction.description: Reduces your Council Tax band by one level.
eligibility: An extra bathroom or kitchen needed for the disabled person
A room (other than a bathroom or kitchen) needed for the disabled person (e.g. for treatment)
Space for a wheelchair used indoors

water_sure.name: WaterSure Scheme
water_sure.description: Caps your water bill if you have a water meter and need to use a lot of water for medical reasons or have 3+ children.
water_sure.eligibility: Receiving a qualifying benefit (e.g. UC, Child Tax Credit) AND have a medical condition requiring high water use OR 3+ children under 19.

nhs_help_with_health_costs.name: NHS Help with Health Costs
benefits: Free prescriptions (for children under 16/18, or if on UC)
Free NHS eyesight tests and vouchers for glasses
nhs_help_with_health_costs.eligibility: Automatic for children under 16. Adults qualify if on Universal Credit (with net earnings below threshold), Income Support, or have an HC2 certificate.
